---
name: Event Submission
about: Propose a new APSMMB event (seminar, symposium, workshop, or social gathering)
title: "[EVENT] "
labels: event
assignees: ''
---

## Event Proposal

### Basic Information

**Event title:**
<!-- Provide a clear, descriptive title for the event -->

**Event type:**
- [ ] Symposium
- [ ] Seminar
- [ ] Workshop
- [ ] Social / Networking
- [ ] Other: ___________

**Proposed date(s):**
<!-- Preferred date(s) and any constraints -->

**Duration:**
<!-- e.g., 90 minutes, half day, full day, multi-day -->

**Format:**
- [ ] In-person
- [ ] Online (specify platform if known)
- [ ] Hybrid

**Proposed location / platform:**
<!-- City, country (for in-person); preferred platform (for online) -->

---

### Event Description

**Brief description (2–4 sentences):**
<!-- What is the event about? What is its scientific or professional focus? -->

**Learning outcomes / goals:**
<!-- What will participants gain or learn from attending? -->

**Target audience:**
<!-- e.g., all members, early-career researchers, specific subdiscipline -->

---

### Speakers / Facilitators

**Confirmed speakers/facilitators (if any):**
<!-- Names, affiliations, and roles (keynote, panellist, workshop facilitator, etc.) -->

**Speakers/facilitators to be invited:**
<!-- Proposed speakers or facilitators not yet confirmed -->

---

### Logistics

**Estimated number of attendees:**
<!-- Approximate expected attendance -->

**Registration fee (if any):**
<!-- Proposed fee structure for members / non-members -->

**Accessibility considerations:**
<!-- How will the event be made accessible to participants from diverse backgrounds and locations? -->

**Local organising support:**
<!-- Is there an institution or committee willing to assist with local arrangements? -->

---

### Alignment with APSMMB

**How does this event align with APSMMB's mission?**
<!-- Briefly explain how this event fosters the society's goals of collaboration, cultural diversity, and research advancement -->

**Budget requirements (if known):**
<!-- Estimated costs and any expected revenue (registration fees, sponsorships) -->

---

### Proposer Information

**Proposer name:**
**APSMMB membership status:**
**Institution and country:**
**Contact email:**

---

*Proposals are reviewed by the Events Officer. You will be contacted within 14 days. For questions, email events@apsmmb.org.*
